checklist.operator_note: Never ask the player to send the raw key.

checklist.expected_result: required permission readiness or missing permission list

checklist.operator_note: Missing permissions should produce limited mode, not silent empty results.

checklist.operator_note: Bundle can be reviewed and audited through the support workflow.

checklist.expected_result: classification, severity, operator actions, and evidence needed
